# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: WP User Authentication
Description: A simple user authentication plugin for registration and login with password hashing.
Version: 1.0
Author: Your Name
*/

function wpu_auth_register_menu() {
    add_menu_page('User Auth', 'User Auth', 'manage_options', 'wpu-auth', 'wpu_auth_page');
}
add_action('admin_menu', 'wpu_auth_register_menu');

function wpu_auth_page() {
    ?>
    <h1>User Authentication</h1>
    <form method="post" action="">
        <h2>Register</h2>
        <input type="text" name="username" required placeholder="Username" />
        <input type="password" name="password" required placeholder="Password" />
        <input type="submit" name="register" value="Register" />
    </form>
    <form method="post" action="">
        <h2>Login</h2>
        <input type="text" name="login_username" required placeholder="Username" />
        <input type="password" name="login_password" required placeholder="Password" />
        <input type="submit" name="login" value="Login" />
    </form>
    <?php
    if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] == 'POST') {
        if (isset($_POST['register'])) {
            wpu_auth_register($_POST['username'], $_POST['password']);
        } elseif (isset($_POST['login'])) {
            wpu_auth_login($_POST['login_username'], $_POST['login_password']);
        }
    }
}

function wpu_auth_register($username, $password) {
    global $wpdb;
    $hashed_password = password_hash($password, PASSWORD_DEFAULT);
    $wpdb->insert('wp_users', array(
        'user_login' => $username,
        'user_pass' => $hashed_password,
    ));
    echo "User registered successfully!";
}

function wpu_auth_login($username, $password) {
    global $wpdb;
    $user = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare("SELECT * FROM wp_users WHERE user_login = %s", $username));
    if ($user && password_verify($password, $user->user_pass)) {
        echo "Login successful!";
    } else {
        echo "Invalid username or password.";
    }
}
?>
